mapper.select: SELECT id, category_id, name, selling_price, cost_price, storage_condition, image_url, description, created_at, updated_at FROM products
SELECT id, category_id, name, selling_price, cost_price, storage_condition, image_url, description, created_at, updated_at FROM products WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, category_id, name, selling_price, cost_price, storage_condition, image_url, description, created_at, updated_at FROM products WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (category_id, name, selling_price, cost_price, storage_condition, image_url, description) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{sellingPrice}, #{costPrice}, #{storageCondition}, #{imageUrl}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET category_id = #{categoryId}, name = #{name}, selling_price = #{sellingPrice}, cost_price = #{costPrice}, storage_condition = #{storageCondition}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, description = #{description} WHERE id = #{id}
